attributes.action: End the ban on north sea oil and gas exploration and extraction
attributes.additional_details: Put Ed Miliband' net zero policy on the back burner, us the extraction of the energy reserves that we currently have to fund renewable energy solutions in a slower and more sustainable way, Ed Miliband's policies are currently unsustainable and will increase poverty and damage public finances.
attributes.background: Instead of buying oil from other countries and being reliant on our energy from overseas, extract the oil and gas reserves from the north seal, us the money received in taxes etc to reduce the tax burden, fund the military and reduce the poverty that will be caused by the middle east conflict

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
